name: Click Friend Card
description: Check that a user is redirected to another Friend page after clicking on a friend card on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page
descriptionHtml: Check that a user is redirected to another Friend page after clicking on a friend card on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected to be on other user profile page, but was at: https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits
assert '/friends' in 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits'

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Check that friends images block exists
Pre-condition: Locate a user with non-empty friends list
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Click on the All Friends tab
Get all friend cards on the All friends tab on User profile page
